milestones.title: Initialize noise-robust sign SVAR manuscript
milestones.summary: Initialized the manuscript, validated KnowledgeVault, built the source packet, revised the paper plan, and prepared next tasks for the noise-robust sign-restricted SVAR paper.

milestones.title: Remove template-era milestones
milestones.summary: Removed template-era milestones from the manuscript transparency timeline without reverting their underlying work.

milestones.title: Revise BR verification plan
milestones.summary: Revised the manuscript plan after corrected Bonhomme-Robin/noisy-ICA notes and added derivation, simulation, and adversarial review gates for the BR-style profiled cumulant result.

milestones.title: Close M0005 task state
milestones.summary: Cleared the stale M21 task state after verifying that M0005 is closed, committed, tagged, aligned with remote main, and closed on GitHub.

milestones.title: Derive bivariate cumulant map
milestones.summary: Derived the bivariate diagonal-noise SVAR cumulant map through fourth order and marked M05 done, with the result pending M06 adversarial audit.

milestones.title: Audit bivariate cumulant map
milestones.summary: Completed the M06 adversarial audit of the bivariate cumulant map, confirming the coefficient/index pattern and correcting clean-equation versus identifying-restriction language.

milestones.title: Clarify BR applicability
milestones.summary: Documented the Bonhomme-Robin applicability boundary for the bivariate L=K=2 SVAR and defined the manuscript object as a BR-style profiled inversion.

milestones.title: Derive DW noise-robust moments
milestones.summary: Derived a Gaussian-noise DW-like higher-moment route and recorded it as a candidate manuscript structure alongside the BR-style route.

milestones.title: Pivot plan to robust DW
milestones.summary: Pivoted the active manuscript plan to the robust DW comparison structure and removed the old constructive route from active planning surfaces.

milestones.title: M24 Robust DW Audit
milestones.summary: Audited the robust DW higher-moment derivation and recorded a conditional local normalized Gaussian-noise pass with scale, global-alias, and finite-sample caveats.

milestones.title: Scope And M25 DW Result
milestones.summary: Updated the manuscript scope to simultaneous SVAR only, added an early Monte Carlo triage gate after the analytical J-test inversion, and completed the M25 standard-DW J-test derivation.

milestones.title: M35 Early J-test Monte Carlo triage
milestones.summary: Implemented and ran the M35 early standard-DW versus robust-DW J-test Monte Carlo triage; recorded the cautionary gate outcome.

milestones.title: M30 Audit M35 simulation triage
milestones.summary: Audited the M35 simulation triage, patched the noise stress design, and recorded that M35 remains exploratory only.

milestones.title: Replicate sign-noise DW figure
milestones.summary: Replicated the KnowledgeVault sign/standard-DW noise figure and added a robust-DW normalized higher-cumulant panel.

milestones.title: Rebuild sign DW noise grid figure
milestones.summary: Rebuilt the requested KnowledgeVault B-plane sign/DW noise grid with finite-sample N-test cutoffs and added a robust-DW row.

milestones.title: Add non-Gaussianity grid figure
milestones.summary: Added a non-Gaussianity companion grid that fixes residual noise and varies structural higher-moment strength across columns.

milestones.title: Correct non-Gaussianity robust row
milestones.summary: Corrected both grid figures so robust-DW rows use only population higher cumulants and no second moments.

milestones.title: Invert J tests in grid figures
milestones.summary: Converted both grid figures to pointwise 10 percent J-test inversions in all rows.

milestones.title: Update figure-led paper plan
milestones.summary: Updated the paper plan so the M0020 grid pair is the selected visual spine and reordered next steps around validation, formalization, Monte Carlo, and drafting.

milestones.title: M28 grid validation
milestones.summary: Completed the first M28 validation pass for the M0020 grid-pair story and promoted M27 as the next task.

milestones.title: Formalize robust DW diagnostic
milestones.summary: Formalized the M27 robust-DW comparison diagnostic and moved the next recommended task to M29 calibration.

milestones.title: M29 calibrated Monte Carlo first pass
milestones.summary: Created a first calibrated M29 Monte Carlo pass for the standard-DW versus robust-DW evidence gate.

milestones.title: Expand M29 Monte Carlo Evidence
milestones.summary: Expanded M29 with a truth-point residual-bootstrap calibration audit and updated evidence status.

milestones.title: Use Standard Chi-Square Cutoffs
milestones.summary: Recorded chi-square cutoffs as the primary applied M29 benchmark and kept repeated/bootstrap cutoffs as audits.

milestones.title: M29 larger chi-square Monte Carlo
milestones.summary: Ran the larger M29 chi-square-primary Monte Carlo table, marked M29 complete for draft evidence, and updated planning/log surfaces so M31 figure-led drafting is next.

milestones.title: Draft M31 Figure-Led Skeleton
milestones.summary: Drafted the M31 figure-led manuscript skeleton around the two-grid story and M29 chi-square-primary evidence.

milestones.title: Verify Figure One Noise Columns
milestones.summary: Verified and restored Figure 1 as the fixed-non-Gaussianity residual-noise grid with method rows and increasing-noise columns.

milestones.title: Investigate Figure Power Problem
milestones.summary: Solved the high-noise robust-DW power problem by replacing the reported pure robust row with a diagonal-noise robust statistic that stacks the off-diagonal covariance anchor with mixed higher cumulants, lowering the high-noise column to V=(0.5,0.5), regenerating figures, and refreshing M28/M29 evidence.

milestones.title: Align Plan With New Estimator
milestones.summary: Aligned the paper plan and next-task surfaces with the M0030 diagonal-noise robust DW estimator, including explicit off-diagonal covariance anchor language and a new M37 post-M0030 estimator audit task.

milestones.title: Audit diagonal-noise robust estimator
milestones.summary: Completed the M37 post-M0030 diagonal-noise robust estimator audit and marked M37 done.

milestones.title: M32 Literature Positioning
milestones.summary: Drafted the M32 literature-positioning pass and marked M32 done.

milestones.title: Pure robust Figure 1
milestones.summary: Generated pure higher-cumulant Figure 1 variant and superseded the invalid diagonal-anchor robust-DW evidence after scale correction.

milestones.title: Bounded noise covariance figure
milestones.summary: Rendered a bounded-noise recovered-covariance Figure 1 candidate and documented the optional variance-bound screen.

milestones.title: Relative noise covariance figure
milestones.summary: Rendered a relative-noise robust Figure 1 candidate and documented the signal-to-noise covariance screen.

milestones.title: Plan variance-ratio proposal
milestones.summary: Updated the manuscript plan and future task sequence around the variance-ratio robust DW proposal.

milestones.title: Sketch Sections 2-4 with formulas
milestones.summary: Drafted formula-first Sections 2-4 for the noisy sign pseudo-set, standard-DW misspecification sketch, and variance-ratio robust DW proposal.

milestones.title: Audit variance-ratio robust DW screen
milestones.summary: Audited the variance-ratio robust DW covariance screen and conditionally cleared it for proposal prose while keeping evidence rebuild gates open.

milestones.title: M42-M45 math and evidence rebuild
milestones.summary: Completed M42-M45: cleaned draft math delimiters, rebuilt Figure 2 with the variance-ratio robust row, added Figure 3 sample-size grid, and rebuilt lightweight M45 validation/Monte Carlo evidence.

milestones.title: Incorporate revision comments
milestones.summary: Incorporated revision comments by rewriting the abstract, introduction, and Sections 2-4 around SVAR-reader language, recovered-shock orthogonality, residual-noise bias, no-noise DW refinement, and the information/noise-ratio robust construction.

milestones.title: M34 adversarial review
milestones.summary: Finished the missing GitHub milestone linkage for M0041 and completed M34 adversarial scope, logic, and style review with targeted claim-tightening edits, review-log findings, updated planning surfaces, and a drafted conclusion.

milestones.title: Track DW moment comments
milestones.summary: Added priority task M48 for the user's DW moment-definition, noisy derivation, normalization, code-audit, and rebuild comments.

milestones.title: Resolve DW moment normalization
milestones.summary: Resolved M48 by auditing DW moment definitions, Figure 1 implementation, noisy truth product moments, and the normalization chart.

milestones.title: Harden scientific workflow
milestones.summary: Hardened the manuscript workflow after the M48 failure: added scientific claim gates, quarantined M48, added M49 as the source-first DW audit, and made M47 conditional on M49.

milestones.title: Improve task handoff workflow
milestones.summary: Improved manuscript task hand-off workflow by adding task-packet rules, a reusable packet template, and a self-contained M49 packet preserving the original user prompt and scientific acceptance criteria.

milestones.title: Clarify next-task workflow
milestones.summary: Clarified next-task and task-planning workflow so common prompts are explicitly packet-aware.

milestones.title: M49 DW source audit
milestones.summary: Completed the M49 DW source and noisy-moment audit; corrected the draft source menu; classified current standard-DW evidence as historical hybrid; created M52 for the source-correct rebuild.

milestones.title: Plan DW notation rewrite
milestones.summary: Planned M53 as the packet-backed DW and robust moment notation rewrite: replace Section 3 h_i(B) notation with e_t(B), and recast Section 4 robust restrictions as explicit moment conditions before M52 evidence work.

milestones.title: M53 DW and robust moment notation rewrite
milestones.summary: Completed M53 notation rewrite: Section 3 now uses e_t(B) recovered-shock notation for the source-correct DW menu, and Section 4 now displays the robust stack as explicit moment equations with fourth-order covariance-product subtractions.

milestones.title: Plan moment derivation normalization audit
milestones.summary: Planned M54 as the stepwise transformed-noise moment derivation and normalization audit before M52.

milestones.title: M54 stepwise moment derivation and normalization audit
milestones.summary: Derived the requested transformed-noise moments step by step at B=B0, distinguished general residual-noise moments from Gaussian covariance-product simplifications, retained the manuscript in the common diag(B)=1 chart, and updated the M52 handoff plus planning surfaces.

milestones.title: Plan main-text moment explanation
milestones.summary: Planned M55 as the main-text robust moment explanation task, routed it before M52, and updated planning/log/formal surfaces to require the S(B) versus Omega(B) distinction and candidate-by-candidate moment computation explanation.

milestones.title: Plan robust cumulant GMM audit
milestones.summary: Planned M56 as the robust cumulant GMM/generated-moment audit, routed it before M55 and M52, and updated planning/log/formal surfaces to flag that product-of-sample-moments cumulants may require primitive-moment weighting, augmented nuisance GMM, bootstrap calibration, or provisional evidence wording.

milestones.title: M56 robust cumulant GMM audit
milestones.summary: Completed M56 robust cumulant GMM generated-moment audit, classified the robust fourth-cumulant statistic as a generated smooth moment, and routed M55/M52 around primitive-delta, augmented-nuisance, or calibrated inference.
